scripts.dist:mac: npm run dist:prepare && npm run release:preflight:mac && npm run build && npm run build-renderer && npm run copy-renderer && npm run copy-icons && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.dist:linux: npm run dist:prepare && npm run build && npm run build-renderer && npm run copy-renderer && npm run copy-icons && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.dist:win: npm run dist:prepare && npm run build && npm run build-renderer && npm run copy-renderer && npm run copy-icons && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.js
